description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 3 platform/commercial cluster, plus the entitlement-vs-authorization axis.

cases.prompt: Map Free, Pro, and Enterprise into concrete features and limits, enforced the same way in the UI, the API, and background jobs, with sane trial and downgrade behavior.
cases.reason: Plan-to-entitlement mapping, uniform enforcement, and plan transitions — the commercial gating axis.

cases.prompt: Decide what's pooled versus per-tenant in our deployment and what belongs in the control plane as we go multi-tenant.
cases.reason: Deployment model and control-plane split are platform structure, not plan gating.

cases.prompt: Our Pro plan includes 500 AI credits — figure out whether that allowance is profitable at current token prices and usage patterns.
cases.reason: The allowance exists; the question is cost and margin — unit economics, not entitlement design.

cases.prompt: Within a workspace, decide which roles may invite members and which may export data.
cases.reason: Role capability inside a tenant is authorization; no plan tier is involved.
